2604.25898.title: TSN-Affinity: Similarity-Driven Parameter Reuse for Continual Offline Reinforcement Learning
2604.25898.paper_summary: Continual offline reinforcement learning (CORL) aims to learn a sequence of tasks from datasets collected over time while preserving performance on previously learned tasks. This setting corresponds to domains where new tasks arise over time, but adapting the model in live environment interactions is expensive, risky, or impossible. However, CORL inherits the dual difficulty of offline reinforcement learning and adapting while preventing catastrophic forgetting. Replay-based continual learning approaches remain a strong baseline but incur memory overhead and suffer from a distribution mismatch between replayed samples and newly learned policies. At the same time, architectural continual learning methods have shown strong potential in supervised learning but remain underexplored in CORL. In this work, we propose TSN-Affinity, a novel CORL method based on TinySubNetworks and Decision Transformer. The method enables task-specific parameterization and controlled knowledge sharing through a RL-aware reuse strategy that routes tasks according to action compatibility and latent similarity. We evaluate the approach on benchmarks based on Atari games and simulations of manipulation tasks with the Franka Emika Panda robotic arm, covering both discrete and continuous control. Results show strong retention from sparse SubNetworks, with routing further improving multi-task performance. Our findings suggest that similarity-guided architectural reuse is a strong and viable alternative to replay-based strategies in a CORL setting. Our code is available at: https://github.com/anonymized-for-submission123/tsn-affinity.
2604.25898.paper_summary_zh: 持續離線強化學習（CORL）的目標是從隨時間收集的數據集中學習一系列任務，同時保持對先前學習任務的表現。這種設置對應於隨時間出現新任務的領域，但在實時環境互動中調整模型是昂貴的、風險高的或不可能的。然而，CORL 繼承了離線強化學習和適應的雙重困難，同時防止災難性遺忘。基於重播的持續學習方法仍然是一個強大的基準，但會產生內存開銷，並且在重播樣本和新學習策略之間存在分佈不匹配的問題。與此同時，架構持續學習方法在監督學習中顯示出強大的潛力，但在 CORL 中仍然未被充分探索。在這項工作中，我們提出了 TSN-Affinity，一種基於 TinySubNetworks 和 Decision Transformer 的新型 CORL 方法。該方法通過一種 RL 感知的重用策略，使得任務特定的參數化和受控知識共享，根據行動兼容性和潛在相似性來路由任務。我們在基於 Atari 遊戲的基準和使用 Franka Emika Panda 機器手臂的操作任務模擬上評估了該方法，涵蓋了離散和連續控制。結果顯示，稀疏 SubNetworks 的保留效果良好，路由進一步提高了多任務性能。我們的發現表明，相似性引導的架構重用是 CORL 設置中一種強大且可行的替代方案，取代基於重播的策略。我們的代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/anonymized-for-submission123/tsn-affinity。
2604.25898.author: Dominik Żurek et.al.
2604.25898.authors: Dominik Żurek, Kamil Faber, Marcin Pietron, Paweł Gajewski, Roberto Corizzo
